groups.instruction: Answer the questions based on the audio.
groups.prompt_html:
MATCHING INFORMATION TO CATEGORIES 35

Questions 26 - 30

Choose the unique selling point of each of the following internship agencies

26 Intern-tastic

27 Total Internships

28 IMC Group

29 Interns International

30 Placements.com

A - Their charges are low.B - They have an excellent reputation.C - They ensure that all interns are paid.D - They make all the arrangements for interns.E - They support their interns throughout their placement.F - They take great care to find the right role for each applicant.A - Their charges are low.B - They have an excellent reputation.C - They ensure that all interns are paid.D - They make all the arrangements for interns.E - They support their interns throughout their placement.F - They take great care to find the right role for each applicant.A - Their charges are low.B - They have an excellent reputation.C - They ensure that all interns are paid.D - They make all the arrangements for interns.E - They support their interns throughout their placement.F - They take great care to find the right role for each applicant.A - Their charges are low.B - They have an excellent reputation.C - They ensure that all interns are paid.D - They make all the arrangements for interns.E - They support their interns throughout their placement.F - They take great care to find the right role for each applicant.A - Their charges are low.B - They have an excellent reputation.C - They ensure that all interns are paid.D - They make all the arrangements for interns.E - They support their interns throughout their placement.F - They take great care to find the right role for each applicant.

options.label: C
options.text: - They ensure that all interns are paid.

options.label: D
options.text: - They make all the arrangements for interns.

options.label: E
options.text: - They support their interns throughout their placement.

options.label: F
options.text: - They take great care to find the right role for each applicant.
